rulings.Case Title: JEAN PHLEGER VS. JOHN LEE HUDSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 27, 2008 LINE 3. CROSS-DEFENDANTS JOHN HUDSON AND SHANA HUDSON'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AND LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED ONLY TO PLEAD A BREACH OF CONTRACT ACTION. THE ELDER ABUSE STATUTE IS NOT MEANT TO APPLY TO A STRAIGHT FORWARD BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION BASED ON PROMISES MADE WITHOUT AN INTENT TO PERFORM UPON WHICH PLAINTIFF RELIED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: TROY STERMER VS. L'OCCITANE INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Applciation For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Expenses, Class Representative Enhancement And Individual Settlement; Appendix Of Non-California Authorities
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 27, 2008 LINE 4. PLAINTIFF TROY STERMER'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, APPLICATION For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Expenses, Class Representative Enhancement And Individual Settlement: THE SETTLEMENT IS APPROVED. DISTRIBUTION OF THE SETTLEMENT FUNDS TO THE OVERTIME CLASS MEMBERS AND THE LABOR CODE 212 CLASS MEMBERS IS APPROVED. CLASS COUNSEL ARE AWARDED $112,500 IN ATTORNEYS' FEES AND $8,500 IN COSTS. A $2,500 ENHANCEMENT FEE IS APPROVED FOR PLAINTIFF TROY STERMER AND $5,000 IS APPROVED TO SETTLE MR. STERMER'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIM. $25,000 IS APPROVED TO ROSENTHAL TO COVER THE COSTS OF DISTRIBUTION. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL OSMAN VS. HOWARD EDWARD SCOTT MILLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Severance Of X-Comp
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 27, 2008 LINE 7. CROSS-COMPLAINANT HOWARD MILLER'S MOTION For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Severance Of CROSS-COMPLAINT: THE REQUEST TO RECONSIDER IS GRANTED AND THE MOTION IS DENIED. LOGICALLY, THIS CASE SHOULD BE TRIED IN ONE LOCATION. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF PROPERLY BROUGHT THE CASE IN SAN FRANCISCO WHERE DEFENDANT RESIDES AND DID NOT SUE THE STATE; STANDING ALONE DEFENDANT HAS NO BASIS FOR CHANGING VENUE TO MARIN. BY NAMING THE STATE AND BY RELYING UPON THE STATE'S RIGHT TO HAVE THE CASE HEARD IN MARIN, DEFENDANT SEEKS TO CHANGE VENUE. DEFENDANT POSITS ARE NUMBER OF EVENTS THAT MAY HAPPEN; AT THE SAME TIME, THEY MAY NOT. ABSENT AN INDEPENDENT BASIS TO CHANGE VENUE, DEFENDANT CANNOT ACCOMPLISH THE TASK BY NAMING THE STATE. =(302/PJM/AY)
